quotes.verbatim_quote:
This page features a handy reference of all the chord voicings that comprise the chord dictionary
covered in Module 3.
quotes.why_load_bearing: States the role of the chord-melody dictionary as a consolidated reference for the Module 3 voicings.

quotes.topic: Major II V I string set 4321
quotes.verbatim_quote: MAJOR II V I CHORDS – STRING SET 4321
quotes.why_load_bearing: Names a load-bearing voicing family in O'Rourke's method: major ii V I voicings on the top four strings.

quotes.topic: Major II V I string set 5432
quotes.verbatim_quote: MAJOR II V I CHORDS – STRING SET 5432
quotes.why_load_bearing: Names the second canonical string set for major ii V I voicings, completing the pair.

quotes.topic: Minor II V I string set 4321
quotes.verbatim_quote: MINOR II V I CHORDS – STRING SET 4321
quotes.why_load_bearing: Names the minor-key counterpart string set, including the b5 and b9 alterations characteristic of minor ii V i.

quotes.topic: Minor II V I string set 5432
quotes.verbatim_quote: MINOR II V I CHORDS – STRING SET 5432
quotes.why_load_bearing: Names the second minor-key string set, completing the four-way taxonomy of ii V i voicings in this method.
Heads the dictionary section covering altered/extended dominants, a load-bearing color resource for the method.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Here’s an overview of useful solo guitar voicings as featured in module 4.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Frames the second dictionary section as the canonical solo-guitar voicing reference for Module 4.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
SHELL VOICINGS

Root on the 6th String
quotes.why_load_bearing: Names the 6th-string-root shell-voicing family, the structural backbone of O'Rourke's solo-guitar comping.
Heads the catalog of extensions added on top of shells, the load-bearing harmonic vocabulary for solo arranging.
